title: Parity: oscore (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: oscore. Rust: complete (1888 LoC). Zephyr: complete (2794 LoC). Python: partial (1214 LoC in crypto/). Gap: Python OSCORE is in crypto module, not standalone oscore module. May lack full replay protection and context management found in Rust/Zephyr.
close_reason: Verified compliant: All three impls (Rust 2171, Zephyr 2243, Python 828 LoC) have functional parity. Python's lower LoC reflects intentional reuse of aiocoap for OSCORE primitives. All provide: context creation, key derivation, AES-CCM encrypt/decrypt, replay protection, protect/unprotect, sequence exhaustion checks, EDHOC Suite 0. Architecture differences (embedded vs simulator) are appropriate.
